title: Litigation trends in real estate: Insolvency and dispute resolution
description: In this Leading Questions piece, Sachit Mathur discusses the litigation trends reshaping real estate insolvency and dispute resolution in India, drawing on the IBC Amendment Act, 2026, and the IBBI Committee Report on real estate insolvency, both published in the first week of April 2026.Question: What are the defining litigation trends in real estate insolvency and dispute resolution right now?Answer: The first is a more complex creditor matrix: real estate insolvency now routinely involves ins
